nasb.text: and have cast their gods into the fire, for they were not gods but the work of men’s hands, wood and stone. So they have destroyed them.

esv.text: and have cast their gods into the fire, for they were not gods, but the work of men’s hands, wood and stone. Therefore they were destroyed.

cnv.text: 把它們的神丟進火裡，但他們並不是神，不過是人手用木頭、石頭做成的，因此他們可以把他們除掉。

ccb.text: 把列国的神像丢在火中。因为那些神像只是人用木头石头制造的，根本不是神。
